name: Trellis
description: A garden lattice of tilted square frames, vines threading the gaps — each redraw re-squares the trellis and regrows its buds.

code.style: --frame: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --bud: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 10%; border: calc(60px / @Y) solid var(--frame); transform: rotate(@rand(40deg, 50deg)) scale(@rand(0.85, 1.1)); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.22) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 14%; left: @rand(20%, 66%); top: @rand(20%, 66%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bud); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
